subject: [PATCH v3 10/11] mm: install PMD swap entries on swap-out

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch optimizes the swap-out process for huge pages by installing PMD-level swap entries instead of splitting them into individual PTEs, reducing overhead and improving performance. It mirrors the existing PTE swap-out path at PMD granularity, handling zswap and adjusting MM_ANONPAGES / MM_SWAPENTS accordingly. The patch introduces a new function set_pmd_swap_entry() to install the swap PMD, which preserves original soft-dirty, uffd-wp, and exclusive bits. This change aims to improve the efficiency of huge page swapping and reduce the load on khugepaged.
